organizations.leaveEmptyForStandardSpace: Leave empty to access your standard client space.
organizations.privateSpaceNotice: You will sign in to {company}'s private space.
organizations.companyNotAuthorized: You are not authorized to access this company.
organizations.companySuspended: This company space is temporarily suspended.
organizations.dtscCannotAccessPrivateSpaces: DTSC cannot access clients' private internal spaces.
organizations.privateDataAccessDenied: Access denied to this company's internal data.

enterpriseSectors.applyAfterCreation: Automatically apply the template after creation
enterpriseSectors.sectorIsolationNotice: Modules, positions and activities are isolated by company and active membership.

enterpriseHealthcare.title: Usable submodules
enterpriseHealthcare.description: The items below are persisted per company, filtered by organization and linked to enabled healthcare modules.
enterpriseHealthcare.emptyHint: Create a first record to make the healthcare model usable.
enterpriseHealthcare.patientsDescription: Administrative profiles, contacts and coverage information.
enterpriseHealthcare.appointmentsDescription: Planning for consultations, care and internal follow-up.
enterpriseHealthcare.qualityIncidentsDescription: Patient, confidentiality, safety and continuous improvement reports.
enterpriseHealthcare.formDescription: This form saves business data isolated inside this company.
enterpriseHealthcare.archiveDescription: The item will leave active lists while remaining traceable in audit logs.

enterpriseCalendar.title: Internal calendar
enterpriseCalendar.description: Meetings, missions, tasks and calls created from the calendar remain isolated in this organization and feed the adapted internal views.
enterpriseCalendar.empty: No internal event has been planned for this company yet.
enterpriseCalendar.privacyDescription: The calendar uses the company's active members. Private events, participants and availabilities never leave the enterprise context.

announcements.pageDescription: Read internal announcements, react and discuss in comments. Authorized roles can publish.
announcements.publisherAllowed: Your role can publish on the DTSC wall.
announcements.publisherReadonly: Clients can read, comment and react to announcements.
announcements.contentPlaceholder: Announcement content. You can format text, paste styled content or add images.
announcements.previewEmpty: The announcement content will appear here.
announcements.localDraftNotice: You are editing a local copy. The server will sync only after Save.
announcements.transferSearch: Search by name, email, position or department

chat.sharedSnapshotNotice: Sharing creates a readable copy, not access to the original private conversation

calendar.title: Internal calendar
calendar.description: Track availability, tasks, meetings, missions, absences, remote work and conflicts before assigning a collaborator.
calendar.availabilityDescription: Define an availability, absence, leave, mission or remote-work slot.
calendar.deleteAvailabilityConfirm: This availability will be removed from active views while remaining traceable in audit logs.
calendar.availabilityFrequencyHint: Choose a single date or a clear frequency.
calendar.specificDateHint: Use this mode for an availability tied to one date.
calendar.weeklyDayHint: Day used only for a weekly frequency.
calendar.recurrenceStartHint: Date from which the frequency applies.
calendar.recurrenceUntilHint: Optional. Leave blank if the frequency stays open.
calendar.searchPlaceholder: Search by event, status, priority or collaborator...
calendar.selectEvent: Select an event to view details.
calendar.cancelConfirm: This action cancels the event and removes it from active views. It is audited.
calendar.eventFormDescription: Create an internal event with conflict detection and participant notifications.
calendar.filteredDetailsDescription: Detailed scrollable list for the selected filter.
calendar.collaboratorDialogDescription: Choose a collaborator, then create an event directly linked to their schedule.
calendar.searchCollaborators: Search a collaborator, role, email or department...

calls.emptyCallChat: No text message during this call yet. Write here to feed the group conversation directly.
calls.activeWhileChatOpen: The call stays active while chat is open. Audio and video remain connected.

adminBillingControl.title: Subscriptions & billing
adminBillingControl.description: Manage the client subscription lifecycle. Cancellations and renewals preserve history for audit purposes.
adminBillingControl.businessCancellation: This operation ends current access without deleting history, payments, or logs.
adminBillingControl.pricingDescription: Pricing changes apply to future payments. Historical invoices and payments keep their original amount.
adminBillingControl.pricingAdminOnly: Plan and pricing changes are restricted to the ADMIN role.
adminBillingControl.pricingSaved: Plan and pricing updated. Future payments will use these values.
adminBillingControl.pricingServerUnavailable: The server is temporarily unavailable. The price was not changed.
adminBillingControl.pricingReasonPlaceholder: Example: pricing revision approved by management
adminBillingControl.inactivePlanHint: An inactive plan remains in history but is no longer offered for new subscriptions.
adminBillingControl.immutablePlanIdentifiers: The identifier and slug remain immutable to preserve existing subscriptions, invoices, and SaaS mappings.
adminBillingControl.freePlanHint: The Discovery plan must remain free.
